evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-COVER-001 ... Coverage (Depth) Calculation — per-base sequencing depth over a reference
subject: concept:coverage-depth-calculation

evidence: Definition of done per rule requires `dotnet test` is green in addition to the blocking `dotnet build` gate — the static-analysis gate rides on top of the correctness test suite.
subject: concept:build-quality-gate

evidence: Evidence Artifact: ALIGN-GLOBAL-001 ... Online Sources ... Test Dataset ... Deviations and Assumptions ... References
subject: concept:algorithm-validation-evidence

evidence: w_i = f_i / max(f_j) where i,j in synonymous codons for amino acid — the per-family relative-adaptiveness weight is the same synonymous-family normalization RSCU formalizes
subject: concept:codon-adaptation-index

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-DBG-001 ... De Bruijn graph genome assembly — graph construction (BuildDeBruijnGraph) and Eulerian-walk reconstruction (AssembleDeBruijn)
subject: concept:de-bruijn-graph-assembly

evidence: mcp-prompt DoD §2 requires evidence-based Binding tests asserting the algorithm's documented values, reversing the mcp-plan §7 testing policy of two minimal Schema+Binding tests with no business-logic asserts.
subject: source:mcp-prompt

evidence: Total Test Units 364 ... Completed 255 ... each unit maps to a TestSpec and test file(s) in the Processing Registry
subject: concept:test-unit-registry

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-CONSENSUS-001 ... Consensus Computation (column-wise majority/threshold consensus from aligned reads)
subject: concept:consensus-sequence

evidence: Area: Chromosome — telomere analysis is a sibling of the chromosome-analysis copy-number/ploidy family anchored by aneuploidy-detection
subject: concept:telomere-analysis

evidence: Test Unit ID: ALIGN-STATS-001 ... Algorithm: Pairwise Alignment Statistics (Identity / Similarity / Gaps) and Alignment Formatting
subject: concept:alignment-statistics

evidence: Test Unit ID: ALIGN-GLOBAL-001 ... Algorithm: Global Alignment (Needleman–Wunsch)
subject: concept:global-alignment-needleman-wunsch

evidence: mcp-prompt DoD §2 requires the Binding test to assert EXACT expected values ('a deliberately wrong wrapper must FAIL them'), whereas mcp-checklist mandates two minimal tests with deliberately NO business-logic asserts (gate G5.3 audits for that).
subject: source:mcp-prompt

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-MERGE-001 ... Contig Merging (suffix–prefix overlap merge / superstring collapse) ... MergeContigs(contig1, contig2, overlapLength)
subject: concept:contig-merge-overlap-collapse

evidence: Both are Chromosome-analysis family units; Wikipedia Karyotype groups human chromosomes by centromere position, the same karyotype layer aneuploidy scores
subject: concept:centromere-analysis

evidence: Test Unit ID: CHROM-SYNT-001 ... Area: Chromosome Analysis ... FindSyntenyBlocks / DetectRearrangements
subject: concept:synteny-and-rearrangement-detection

evidence: ID: CHROM-TELO-001 ... Title: Telomere Analysis ... Area: Chromosome
subject: concept:telomere-analysis

evidence: CHROM-SYNT-001 is a sibling Chromosome-analysis unit of CHROM-ANEU-001; both operate at whole-chromosome scale (synteny/rearrangement vs copy-number)
subject: concept:synteny-and-rearrangement-detection

evidence: Test Unit ID: CHROM-ANEU-001 ... Algorithm Group: Chromosome Analysis ... Aneuploidy Detection
subject: concept:aneuploidy-detection

evidence: MSA aligns three or more sequences (pairwise alignment handles 2); the star aligner uses Needleman-Wunsch only to fill gaps between exact-match anchors against a chosen center sequence
subject: concept:multiple-sequence-alignment

evidence: Definition of Done (DoD) ... Required Criteria: TestSpec created, Tests written, Branch coverage >= 80%, Edge cases covered, Tests pass, Evidence documented
subject: concept:definition-of-done

evidence: Deviations and Assumptions: None ... the implementation follows the standard Needleman–Wunsch linear gap penalty model exactly as given in the Wikipedia pseudocode
subject: concept:algorithm-validation-evidence

evidence: Architecture Testing (ArchUnitNET) ... Enforces layer boundaries (Core -> Analysis -> IO) ... 22 rules across all 13 modules
subject: concept:validation-and-testing

evidence: Test Unit ID: ALIGN-MULTI-001 ... Multiple Sequence Alignment ... SequenceAligner.MultipleAlign
subject: concept:multiple-sequence-alignment

evidence: Beta — research-grade software, not for clinical or diagnostic use ... Many algorithms are faithful but simplified or subset realisations of fuller published methods
subject: gotcha:research-grade-limitations

evidence: OLC stages: Overlap – Build overlap graph; Layout – Bundle stretches of the overlap graph into contigs; Consensus ... an overlap is a suffix/prefix match — the same overlap primitive the de Bruijn / Eulerian formulation avoids by using fixed k-mers
subject: concept:contig-merge-overlap-collapse

evidence: Hybrid method ... combines features of both global and local alignment ... uses the NW recurrence with linear gap cost but free end gaps in the reference (first row = 0), traceback from max of last row
subject: concept:semi-global-alignment-fitting

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-CORRECT-001 ... K-mer spectrum (two-sided) read error correction
subject: concept:kmer-spectrum-error-correction

evidence: stay scientifically honest (compute with tools — never guess; respect each algorithm's validated envelope; carry provenance)
subject: concept:skill-layer

evidence: Test Unit ID: CHROM-CENT-001 ... Area: Chromosome ... Canonical Method: ChromosomeAnalyzer.AnalyzeCentromere
subject: concept:centromere-analysis

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-OLC-001 ... Overlap-Layout-Consensus (OLC) genome assembly — overlap detection (FindAllOverlaps) and OLC assembly (AssembleOLC)
subject: concept:overlap-layout-consensus-assembly

evidence: One engine, three front doors ... The same validated algorithm answers whichever door you walk through.
subject: concept:three-front-doors

evidence: Test Unit ID: CHROM-KARYO-001 ... Area: Chromosome Analysis ... AnalyzeKaryotype / DetectPloidy
subject: concept:karyotype-analysis

evidence: Test Unit ID: ANNOT-REPEAT-001 ... Algorithm: Repetitive Element Detection and Classification (tandem repeats, inverted repeats, repeat-class assignment)
subject: concept:repetitive-element-detection

evidence: ID: CODON-CAI-001 ... Algorithm: CAI Calculation
subject: concept:codon-adaptation-index

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-SCAFFOLD-001 ... Scaffolding (joining ordered contigs into scaffolds with N-gaps)
subject: concept:scaffolding

evidence: Statistics are computed over the reported aligned region (columns of an existing pairwise alignment such as the EMBOSS needle global alignment); denominator = alignment Length including gap columns.
subject: concept:alignment-statistics

evidence: Test Unit ID: ANNOT-CODONUSAGE-001 ... Algorithm: Relative Synonymous Codon Usage (RSCU)
subject: concept:relative-synonymous-codon-usage

evidence: finding a Hamiltonian path is NP-complete ... motivates heuristic layout and the shift to de Bruijn / Eulerian formulations — OLC and DBG are the two fragment-assembly formulations (Compeau, Pevzner & Tesler 2011)
subject: concept:overlap-layout-consensus-assembly

evidence: Test Unit ID: ANNOT-CODING-001 ... Algorithm: Coding Potential Calculation (CPAT hexamer usage-bias score)
subject: concept:coding-potential-hexamer-score

evidence: It is possible that the distance estimate is negative, indicating that the two contigs should in fact overlap. If such an overlap is indeed found in the contig overlap graph, the two contigs are merged — the negative-gap case is where scaffolding hands off to overlap merging
subject: concept:scaffolding

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-TRIM-001 ... Quality Trimming (BWA / cutadapt running-sum)
subject: concept:quality-trimming-running-sum

evidence: A runtime LimitationPolicy guards each algorithm's validated scope, and results are tool-computed with provenance
subject: concept:scientific-rigor

evidence: AnalyzeKaryotype labels aneuploidy using standard cytogenetic nomenclature based on absolute copy count (nullisomy..pentasomy), the same terminology CHROM-ANEU-001 assigns from read-depth copy number
subject: concept:karyotype-analysis

evidence: Test Unit ID: ALIGN-SEMI-001 ... Algorithm: Semi-Global Alignment (Fitting / Query-in-Reference)
subject: concept:semi-global-alignment-fitting

evidence: Both compute a per-column majority-vote consensus; MSA's consensus step and the assembly 'C' of Overlap-Layout-Consensus share the same column-wise voting model
subject: concept:consensus-sequence

evidence: Test Unit ID: ASSEMBLY-STATS-001 ... Assembly Statistics (N50 / L50 / Nx / Lx / auN, gap detection, contiguity summary)
subject: concept:assembly-statistics
